file_insights.purpose: GitHub Actions CI workflow for automated testing and quality checks
file_insights.structure: Standard workflow with checkout, toolchain setup, and test/lint steps
file_insights.completeness: partial - implements test + clippy but omits format check from stated 'make check' target

patterns_discovered.relevance: Standard practice for Rust CI on GitHub Actions

patterns_discovered.implementation: cargo test && cargo clippy chained together

gotchas_discovered.description: Subtask requires 'make check' but workflow runs 'cargo test && cargo clippy' without 'cargo fmt --check'
gotchas_discovered.impact: Format violations will not be caught in CI, inconsistent with project's defined 'make check = test + clippy + fmt'

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses raw cargo commands instead of 'make check' as stated in requirements
gotchas_discovered.impact: Bypasses potential additional checks or setup that Makefile target provides

gotchas_discovered.description: Workflow doesn't set up environment for Rust builds (CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR, CARGO_INCREMENTAL, etc.)
gotchas_discovered.impact: May not match local development environment fully

approach_outcome.description: CI workflow created and functional, but doesn't fully implement stated 'make check' requirements
approach_outcome.working: Checkout, toolchain install, and cargo test/clippy execution
approach_outcome.missing: Format check (cargo fmt) component of 'make check' target

recommendations.implementation: Add '- run: cargo fmt -- --check' before or after clippy to complete 'make check' equivalence
Replace 'cargo test && cargo clippy' with 'make check' if Makefile is available and contains this target
Use actions/cache@v3 with 'cargo' key to cache dependencies and avoid rebuilds
Separate jobs for test, lint, and format for better visibility and parallel execution
